name: saml
description: Reference auth-kind plugin: SAML 2.0 SP via crewjam/saml.
author: wave

SAML_IDP_METADATA_URL.description: URL of the IdP metadata XML. Required.

SAML_SP_ACS_URL.description: Assertion Consumer Service URL on the orchestrator. Required.

SAML_SP_CERT_PATH.description: Path to the SP certificate (PEM). Required.

SAML_SP_KEY_PATH.description: Path to the SP private key (PEM). Required.
